docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-20-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $118.20 AS TO DEFENDANT SHULGINA, POLINA NIKOLA YEVNA
